title: Synthetic public IDOR disclosed report fixture
text: Synthetic public fixture based on disclosed-report anatomy: IDOR in organization invite role allowed low-privilege owned Account A to access owned Account B workspace object via /api/v1/organizations/42/invites. Researcher used two owned test accounts, screenshots, and minimal STR. Impact: tenant boundary bypass. Remediation: object ownership and role check before returning invite details. Severity: high. Contact: researcher@example.com. Example token: h1_api_token_abc1234567890. OTP: 123456.

title: Synthetic public SSRF callback disclosed report fixture
text: Synthetic public fixture: SSRF through webhook callback to collaborator was proven with only an operator-controlled callback marker. No customer data was accessed. Product surface included webhooks and integrations. Impact: network callback observation. Remediation: URL allowlist and egress filtering.
